name: Public Sector & Government (Germany)
description: Federal, state, and municipal government agencies and public institutions in Germany.

tam.description: Global government cloud and IT services
tam.source: LLM estimate based on Gartner government IT spending forecasts (2025)

sam.description: Cloud and managed IT services for German public sector
sam.source: LLM estimate: German public sector IT spend ~EUR 15B annually, cloud and managed services share ~40% and growing = EUR 6B addressable

som.description: 25 agencies x EUR 1.5M ACV in 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up: ~200 federal and large state agencies with active cloud mandates; T-Systems can win 25 accounts in 3 years at EUR 1.5M average ACV (sovereign cloud + private cloud + compliance-driven managed services) = EUR 37.5M
